title: Purchase Orders
subtitle: Track purchase orders, record goods receipts against them, and run three-way matching (PO ↔ GR ↔ Bill). Posting is deferred pending the backend JE splice.
empty_description: Create a PO to record what was ordered from a vendor. As goods arrive, record receipts against specific PO lines; then match the incoming bill against the PO and receipts.
error_load_detail: Failed to load purchase order detail.

detail.label: PURCHASE ORDER
detail.gr_empty_active: No receipts yet. Record a receipt when goods arrive to update received-vs-ordered quantities.
detail.gr_empty_inactive: No goods receipts were recorded against this PO.
detail.posting_deferred_note: Note: three-way match writes no journal entries in this partial — the JE splice arrives in a follow-up dispatch. Use match results to validate bills before posting them separately.

create_modal.label: NEW PO
create_modal.title: Create Purchase Order
create_modal.error_lines_required: At least one line is required.
create_modal.error_line_qty: Line {{n}}: quantity must be a positive decimal with up to 2 places.
create_modal.error_line_price: Line {{n}}: unit price must be a non-negative decimal with up to 3 places.
create_modal.error_generic: Failed to create PO. Please try again.

gr_modal.label: RECORD RECEIPT
gr_modal.title: Record Goods Receipt
gr_modal.partial_hint: Leave quantities blank for lines not received in this shipment. Partial receipts accumulate across multiple GRs.
gr_modal.error_no_lines: At least one line must have a received quantity > 0.
gr_modal.error_line_qty: {{desc}}: received quantity must be a positive decimal with up to 2 places.
gr_modal.error_generic: Failed to record receipt. Please try again.

match_drawer.label: 3-WAY MATCH
match_drawer.title: Three-Way Match
match_drawer.hint: PO-vs-GR match runs automatically from the lines below. Add billed amounts (per line or total) to extend to a three-way PO↔GR↔Bill match.
match_drawer.error_billed_amount: Billed amount must be a decimal with up to 3 places (or blank).
match_drawer.error_billed_qty: Billed quantities must be decimals with up to 2 places (or blank).
